parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.1-8b-instant",
  "max_tokens": 400,
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": {{ JSON.stringify(
      "JD:
" + $json.jd_text.substring(0,1000) +
      "

Resume:
" + $json.resume.substring(0,800) +
      "

Compare this resume with the job. Give results in simple words:

Overall Match: XX%

Skills Match: XX%
You have: (list matched skills simply)
You need: (list missing skills simply)

Experience Match: XX%
Why: (1 simple sentence)

Should you apply? (Yes/Maybe/No + 1 reason in simple words)"
    ) }}
  }]
}

parameters.subject: =Job Application Ready: {{ $('Company Research').first().json.choices[0].message.content.substring(0,30) }} | Match Score Inside
parameters.message:
=

Your Job Application Package is Ready! 🎉

Hi Abhishek,

Your automated job application package has been generated and saved to Notion.

📦 What's inside your PDF:

  • 📊 Profile Match Score — skills %, experience % breakdown
  • 🏢 Company Research — culture, values, recent news
  • 📄 Tailored Resume — bullet points matched to JD
  • ✉️ Cover Letter — personalized for this role
  • 🎯 Interview Q&A — 5 questions with strong answers

Job URL: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.job_url }}

Good luck with your application! 💪

— Job Autopilot by Abhishek
